business_response_composer.que_entendi: Entendí una consulta del dominio inventario logistica con intención inventory stock by mobile
business_response_composer.datos_usados: Datos usados: base_codigos, logistica_movimientos_entrega, logistica_movimientos_consumo, logistica_movimientos_cobro. Filtros aplicados: bodega
business_response_composer.resultado: Se obtuvieron 500 registros relevantes para inventario
business_response_composer.alertas: Los materiales marcados como CRITICO no cubren tres dias de operacion con el ritmo reciente de consumo
business_response_composer.siguiente_accion: Solicita el detalle o un agrupado por la dimension operativa que quieras revisar

query_intelligence.query: SELECT bal.cedula AS cedula, COALESCE(MAX(p.movil), '') AS movil, COALESCE(MAX(p.nombre), '') AS nombre, COALESCE(MAX(p.apellido), '') AS apellido, TRIM(CONCAT(SUBSTRING_INDEX(TRIM(COALESCE(MAX(p.nombre), '')), ' ', 1), CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(MAX(p.apellido), '')) = '' THEN '' ELSE CONCAT(' ', SUBSTRING_INDEX(TRIM(COALESCE(MAX(p.apellido), '')), ' ', 1)) END)) AS empleado, bal.codigo AS codigo, COALESCE(MAX(cat.descripcion), '') AS descripcion, COALESCE(MAX(cat.tipo), '') AS tipo, COALESCE(cons.consumo_ultimos_8_dias, 0) AS consumo_ultimos_8_dias, ROUND(COALESCE(cons.consumo_ultimos_8_dias, 0) / 8, 4) AS promedio_dia, bal.saldo_actual AS saldo_actual, ROUND((COALESCE(cons.consumo_ultimos_8_dias, 0) / 8) * 3, 4) AS umbral_3_dias, 'CRITICO' AS estado_critico FROM (SELECT mov.cedula AS cedula, mov.codigo AS codigo, SUM(mov.entregas - mov.devoluciones - mov.consumos - mov.cobros) AS saldo_actual, SUM(mov.registros_cantidad_invalida) AS registros_cantidad_invalida FROM (SELECT codigo AS codigo, cedula AS cedula, SUM(0) AS entradas, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(cantidad AS DECIMAL(18,4)) ELSE 0 END) AS entregas, SUM(0) AS devoluciones, SUM(0) AS consumos, SUM(0) AS cobros, SUM(0) AS traslados_otro_aliado, SUM(0) AS traslados_bodega, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS registros_cantidad_invalida FROM logistica_movimientos_entrega WHERE bodega = 'operacion_hfc' GROUP BY codigo, cedula UNION ALL SELECT codigo AS codigo, cedula AS cedula, SUM(0) AS entradas, SUM(0) AS entregas, SUM(0) AS devoluciones, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(cantidad AS DECIMAL(18,4)) ELSE 0 END) AS consumos, SUM(0) AS cobros, SUM(0) AS traslados_otro_aliado, SUM(0) AS traslados_bodega, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS registros_cantidad_invalida FROM logistica_movimientos_consumo WHERE bodega = 'operacion_hfc' GROUP BY codigo, cedula UNION ALL SELECT codigo AS codigo, cedula AS cedula, SUM(0) AS entradas, SUM(0) AS entregas, SUM(0) AS devoluciones, SUM(0) AS consumos, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(cantidad AS DECIMAL(18,4)) ELSE 0 END) AS cobros, SUM(0) AS traslados_otro_aliado, SUM(0) AS traslados_bodega, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS registros_cantidad_invalida FROM logistica_movimientos_cobro WHERE bodega = 'operacion_hfc' GROUP BY codigo, cedula UNION ALL SELECT codigo AS codigo, cedula AS cedula, SUM(0) AS entradas, SUM(0) AS entregas, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(cantidad AS DECIMAL(18,4)) ELSE 0 END) AS devoluciones, SUM(0) AS consumos, SUM(0) AS cobros, SUM(0) AS traslados_otro_aliado, SUM(0) AS traslados_bodega, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS registros_cantidad_invalida FROM logistica_movimientos_devolucion WHERE bodega = 'operacion_hfc' GROUP BY codigo, cedula) AS mov GROUP BY mov.cedula, mov.codigo) AS bal INNER JOIN (SELECT cedula AS cedula, codigo AS codigo, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(cantidad AS DECIMAL(18,4)) ELSE 0 END) AS consumo_ultimos_8_dias FROM logistica_movimientos_consumo WHERE bodega = 'operacion_hfc' AND DATE(f_consumo) >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 8 DAY) GROUP BY cedula, codigo) AS cons ON cons.cedula = bal.cedula AND cons.codigo = bal.codigo LEFT JOIN bd_c3nc4s1s.cinco_base_de_personal AS p ON p.cedula = bal.cedula LEFT JOIN base_codigos AS cat ON cat.codigo = bal.codigo WHERE COALESCE(cons.consumo_ultimos_8_dias, 0) > 0 AND bal.saldo_actual < ((COALESCE(cons.consumo_ultimos_8_dias, 0) / 8) * 3) GROUP BY bal.cedula, COALESCE(p.movil, ''), bal.codigo, bal.saldo_actual, cons.consumo_ultimos_8_dias ORDER BY (umbral_3_dias - saldo_actual) DESC, movil ASC, bal.cedula ASC, bal.codigo ASC LIMIT 500

registros_cantidad_invalida FROM logistica_movimientos_devolucion WHERE bodega = 'operacion_hfc' GROUP BY codigo, cedula) AS mov GROUP BY mov.cedula, mov.codigo) AS bal INNER JOIN (SELECT cedula AS cedula, codigo AS codigo, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(cantidad AS DECIMAL(18,4)) ELSE 0 END) AS consumo_ultimos_8_dias FROM logistica_movimientos_consumo WHERE bodega = 'operacion_hfc' AND DATE(f_consumo) >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 8 DAY) GROUP BY cedula, codigo) AS cons ON cons.cedula = bal.cedula AND cons.codigo = insights: La consulta de inventario se resolvio con SQL asistido validado contra ai_dictionary.
metadata.arbitration_reason: La frase 'saldo ... empleado/tecnico <cedula>' corresponde a saldo de inventario por movil. Se conserva inventario_logistica y empleados queda solo para enrichment.

reasoning.working_goal: Resolver la consulta "materiales criticos por empleado en operacion_hfc cruzando saldo, cedula, movil y datos del empleado" con la mejor evidencia disponible.

state.original_question: materiales criticos por empleado en operacion_hfc cruzando saldo, cedula, movil y datos del empleado

execution_plan.sql_query: SELECT bal.cedula AS cedula, COALESCE(MAX(p.movil), '') AS movil, COALESCE(MAX(p.nombre), '') AS nombre, COALESCE(MAX(p.apellido), '') AS apellido, TRIM(CONCAT(SUBSTRING_INDEX(TRIM(COALESCE(MAX(p.nombre), '')), ' ', 1), CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(MAX(p.apellido), '')) = '' THEN '' ELSE CONCAT(' ', SUBSTRING_INDEX(TRIM(COALESCE(MAX(p.apellido), '')), ' ', 1)) END)) AS empleado, bal.codigo AS codigo, COALESCE(MAX(cat.descripcion), '') AS descripcion, COALESCE(MAX(cat.tipo), '') AS tipo, COALESCE(cons.consumo_ultimos_8_dias, 0) AS consumo_ultimos_8_dias, ROUND(COALESCE(cons.consumo_ultimos_8_dias, 0) / 8, 4) AS promedio_dia, bal.saldo_actual AS saldo_actual, ROUND((COALESCE(cons.consumo_ultimos_8_dias, 0) / 8) * 3, 4) AS umbral_3_dias, 'CRITICO' AS estado_critico FROM (SELECT mov.cedula AS cedula, mov.codigo AS codigo, SUM(mov.entregas - mov.devoluciones - mov.consumos - mov.cobros) AS saldo_actual, SUM(mov.registros_cantidad_invalida) AS registros_cantidad_invalida FROM (SELECT codigo AS codigo, cedula AS cedula, SUM(0) AS entradas, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(cantidad AS DECIMAL(18,4)) ELSE 0 END) AS entregas, SUM(0) AS devoluciones, SUM(0) AS consumos, SUM(0) AS cobros, SUM(0) AS traslados_otro_aliado, SUM(0) AS traslados_bodega, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS registros_cantidad_invalida FROM logistica_movimientos_entrega WHERE bodega = 'operacion_hfc' GROUP BY codigo, cedula UNION ALL SELECT codigo AS codigo, cedula AS cedula, SUM(0) AS entradas, SUM(0) AS entregas, SUM(0) AS devoluciones, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(cantidad AS DECIMAL(18,4)) ELSE 0 END) AS consumos, SUM(0) AS cobros, SUM(0) AS traslados_otro_aliado, SUM(0) AS traslados_bodega, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS registros_cantidad_invalida FROM logistica_movimientos_consumo WHERE bodega = 'operacion_hfc' GROUP BY codigo, cedula UNION ALL SELECT codigo AS codigo, cedula AS cedula, SUM(0) AS entradas, SUM(0) AS entregas, SUM(0) AS devoluciones, SUM(0) AS consumos, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(cantidad AS DECIMAL(18,4)) ELSE 0 END) AS cobros, SUM(0) AS traslados_otro_aliado, SUM(0) AS traslados_bodega, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS registros_cantidad_invalida FROM logistica_movimientos_cobro WHERE bodega = 'operacion_hfc' GROUP BY codigo, cedula UNION ALL SELECT codigo AS codigo, cedula AS cedula, SUM(0) AS entradas, SUM(0) AS entregas, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(cantidad AS DECIMAL(18,4)) ELSE 0 END) AS devoluciones, SUM(0) AS consumos, SUM(0) AS cobros, SUM(0) AS traslados_otro_aliado, SUM(0) AS traslados_bodega, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS registros_cantidad_invalida FROM logistica_movimientos_devolucion WHERE bodega = 'operacion_hfc' GROUP BY codigo, cedula) AS mov GROUP BY mov.cedula, mov.codigo) AS bal INNER JOIN (SELECT cedula AS cedula, codigo AS codigo, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(cantidad AS DECIMAL(18,4)) ELSE 0 END) AS consumo_ultimos_8_dias FROM logistica_movimientos_consumo WHERE bodega = 'operacion_hfc' AND DATE(f_consumo) >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 8 DAY) GROUP BY cedula, codigo) AS cons ON cons.cedula = bal.cedula AND cons.codigo = bal.codigo LEFT JOIN bd_c3nc4s1s.cinco_base_de_personal AS p ON p.cedula = bal.cedula LEFT JOIN base_codigos AS cat ON cat.codigo = bal.codigo WHERE COALESCE(cons.consumo_ultimos_8_dias, 0) > 0 AND bal.saldo_actual < ((COALESCE(cons.consumo_ultimos_8_dias, 0) / 8) * 3) GROUP BY bal.cedula, COALESCE(p.movil, ''), bal.codigo, bal.saldo_actual, cons.consumo_ultimos_8_dias ORDER BY (umbral_3_dias - saldo_actual) DESC, movil ASC, bal.cedula ASC, bal.codigo ASC LIMIT 500

insights: La consulta de inventario se resolvio con SQL asistido validado contra ai_dictionary.
metadata.arbitration_reason: La frase 'saldo ... empleado/tecnico <cedula>' corresponde a saldo de inventario por movil. Se conserva inventario_logistica y empleados queda solo para enrichment.

recommendations: Explorar el mismo analisis por sede, area, cargo o fecha.
La consulta se resolvio con metadata estructural validada antes de ejecutar SQL.
Los materiales marcados como CRITICO no cubren tres dias de operacion con el ritmo reciente de consumo.
